report_name: DXC and Anthropic Form Alliance to Deploy AI in Enterprise Systems

tools.name: Claude
tools.description: An AI model family from Anthropic being integrated into enterprise systems, including the DXC OASIS security platform, to serve as a 'security engineer sub-agent' and to accelerate software development.

tools.name: DXC OASIS
tools.description: A security platform by DXC Technology into which the Claude AI model is being integrated to enhance cyber resilience in Security Operations Centers (SOCs).

identities.name: DXC Technology
identities.description: An IT services provider that formed a global partnership with Anthropic to deploy Claude AI models for its enterprise clients.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: An AI safety and research company that partnered with DXC Technology to integrate its Claude AI models into enterprise systems.

identities.name: OpenAI
identities.description: Mentioned as a competitor to Anthropic in the enterprise AI market.

identities.name: Google
identities.description: Mentioned as a competitor to Anthropic in the enterprise AI market.
